sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83303" key="pista/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πιστ-άκη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n83303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pistachio-tree, Pistacia vera</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
